_comment: C3 coverage waivers (docs/COVERAGE-CRITERIA.md). Endpoints that can NEVER 2xx on the shared test account BY DESIGN. A waived endpoint leaves the C3 denominator but MUST still be C2 (called; the 4xx is the evidence). class: blast-radius | entitlement | unsatisfiable-flow | billing-prohibitive. HUMANS approve every addition (same review discipline as combo-scenarios). key = catalog endpoint key. The dashboard surfaces waived counts and flags waived endpoints that DO get a 2xx as removal candidates.
